data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the cancellation policy, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the system's enforcement of a 24-hour notice for cancellations. While the linked use case mentions that cancellations more than 24 hours ahead result in an automatic refund, there are no prior steps that demonstrate this functionality in action or provide evidence of the cancellation process. This indicates a gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of a 24-hour notice for cancellations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
